base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of drakee_blue_idle — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Drakee — small blue bat-creature with big eye. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Drakee — small blue bat-creature with big eye; early overworld enemy
